title: Mitochondrial Isolation SOP
author: Elena Pumbo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfr7jm9n

steps.title: )" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Tissue preparation
steps.instruction: )" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Tissue preparation

steps.title: For 5 mL of 15-20 mg/mL...
steps.instruction: For 5 mL of 15-20 mg/mL of liver mitochondria protein we need 10-15 gm of frozen mouse liver tissue. If more of less protein needed scale these numbers up or down.

steps.title: Cool down centrifuge and Rotor F-35-6-30...
steps.instruction: Cool down centrifuge and Rotor F-35-6-30 for 6 x 50 mL and 5 x 15 mL tubes. Set temperature +4 0 C.

steps.title: ·Take livers from -80 0 C...
steps.instruction: ·Take livers from -80 0 C freezer put on dry ice.

steps.title: ·Measure weight of a 10x10 cm...
steps.instruction: ·Measure weight of a 10x10 cm square of aluminum foil using )" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Mettler Toledo Analytical Balance and write it down.

steps.title: ·Put on the foil unwrapped frozen...
steps.instruction: ·Put on the foil unwrapped frozen livers up to 15 gm (about 10 livers)

steps.title: ·Subtract foil weight
steps.instruction: ·Subtract foil weight.

steps.title: ·Write number
steps.instruction: ·Write number.

steps.title: ·Keep livers on ice
steps.instruction: ·Keep livers on ice.

steps.title: ·Bring liquid nitrogen in special 1 L liquid nitrogen container
steps.instruction: ·Bring liquid nitrogen in special 1 L liquid nitrogen container.

steps.title: ·Take ceramic mortar and pestle
steps.instruction: ·Take ceramic mortar and pestle

steps.title: ·Fill mortar with liquid nitrogen and...
steps.instruction: ·Fill mortar with liquid nitrogen and put pestle on dry ice cool down.

steps.title: ·Put metal spatula on dry ice...
steps.instruction: ·Put metal spatula on dry ice to )" target="_blank" rel="noopener">cool down .

steps.title: ·After liquid nitrogen evaporate mortar is cold enough
steps.instruction: ·After liquid nitrogen evaporate mortar is cold enough.

steps.title: ·Prepare 50 mL conical tube and...
steps.instruction: ·Prepare 50 mL conical tube and put int on dry ice

steps.title: ·Put 1 st frozen liver in...
steps.instruction: ·Put 1 st frozen liver in the mortar and add ½ liquid nitrogen up to ½ mortar volume.

steps.title: ·Wrap pestle with paper towel to...
steps.instruction: ·Wrap pestle with paper towel to avoid frost bite and cover mortar with paper towel.

steps.title: ·Grind liver till there is only powder in the mortar
steps.instruction: ·Grind liver till there is only powder in the mortar.

steps.title: ·With cold spatula put grinded tissue...
steps.instruction: ·With cold spatula put grinded tissue in the 50 mL tube.

steps.title: ·Repeat with next liver until all of them are ground
steps.instruction: ·Repeat with next liver until all of them are ground.

steps.title: ·Put mortar and pestle aside to warm up
steps.instruction: ·Put mortar and pestle aside to warm up.

steps.title: ·Clean the bench with 70% ethanol
steps.instruction: ·Clean the bench with 70% ethanol.

steps.title: ·Prepare fresh 50 mL conical tube
steps.instruction: ·Prepare fresh 50 mL conical tube.

steps.title: ·Measure weight using Mettler Toledo Analytical...
steps.instruction: ·Measure weight using Mettler Toledo Analytical Balance and wright it down.

steps.title: ·Transfer in fresh tube 10 gm...
steps.instruction: ·Transfer in fresh tube 10 gm of grinded liver powder (subtract weight of empty tube from weight of the tube with tissue).

steps.title: ·Extra grinded liver store in -80 0 C
steps.instruction: ·Extra grinded liver store in -80 0 C.

steps.title: ·To the tube with 10 gm...
steps.instruction: ·To the tube with 10 gm of frozen liver add Tissue lysis Buffer up to 50 mL.

steps.title: ·Wait till all tissue thawed
steps.instruction: ·Wait till all tissue thawed. Vortex from time to time.

steps.title: ·Prepare 25 Matrix A 2mL tubes for MP Homogenizer
steps.instruction: ·Prepare 25 Matrix A 2mL tubes for MP Homogenizer

steps.title: ·When tissue is fully thawed using...
steps.instruction: ·When tissue is fully thawed using transfer pipettes aliquot 50 mL in Martix A tubes.

steps.title: ·Following instruction for MP Homogenizer choose on touch screen
steps.instruction: ·Following instruction for MP Homogenizer choose on touch screen

steps.title: -Recommended Settings (Animal
steps.instruction: -Recommended Settings (Animal: mouse, organ: liver)

steps.title: -Run
steps.instruction: -Run

steps.title: ·After program finished put tubes with...
steps.instruction: ·After program finished put tubes with homogenized liver on regular ice.

steps.title: ·Clean and turn off MP Homogenizer
steps.instruction: ·Clean and turn off MP Homogenizer

steps.title: ·Using transfer pipette transfer homogenate into fresh 50ml tube
steps.instruction: ·Using transfer pipette transfer homogenate into fresh 50ml tube.
2. )" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Mitochondria Extraction

steps.title: ·Prepare 50 mL conical tube with water for balance
steps.instruction: ·Prepare 50 mL conical tube with water for balance

steps.title: ·Using transfer pipette transfer homogenate from...
steps.instruction: ·Using transfer pipette transfer homogenate from Matrix A tubes into fresh 50ml tube.

steps.title: ·Label tube “Pellet 1”
steps.instruction: ·Label tube “Pellet 1”

steps.title: ·Put 50 mL tube with homogenate...
steps.instruction: ·Put 50 mL tube with homogenate and balance into Rotor F-35-6-30

steps.title: 1 st slow centrifugation
steps.instruction: 1 st slow centrifugation. Close rotor lid tightly Close centrifuge Set centrifuge: 2000 rpm, 10 min, 4 °C

steps.title: ·After centrifugation finished, take tube from...
steps.instruction: ·After centrifugation finished, take tube from centrifuge and put on ice.

steps.title: ·Transfer supernatant into fresh tube
steps.instruction: ·Transfer supernatant into fresh tube. Label tube “Supernatant 1”

steps.title: ·Discard pellet
steps.instruction: ·Discard pellet.

steps.title: ·Adjust balance volume to new sample volume
steps.instruction: ·Adjust balance volume to new sample volume.

steps.title: ·Put 50 mL tube with homogente...
steps.instruction: ·Put 50 mL tube with homogente and balance into Rotor F-35-6-30

steps.title: 1 st fast centrifugation
steps.instruction: 1 st fast centrifugation. Close rotor lid, tightly Close centrifuge, Set centrifuge: 7830 rpm, 20 min, 4 °C

steps.title: ·After centrifugation finished, take tube from...
steps.instruction: ·After centrifugation finished, take tube from centrifuge and put on ice.

steps.title: ·With q-tips remove white fat floating...
steps.instruction: ·With q-tips remove white fat floating on the top of supernatant.

steps.title: ·Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: ·Discard supernatant.

steps.title: ·Resuspend pellet in 25 mL of Tissue Lysis Buffer
steps.instruction: ·Resuspend pellet in 25 mL of Tissue Lysis Buffer.

steps.title: ·Transfer into fresh tube
steps.instruction: ·Transfer into fresh tube. Label tube “Pellet 2”

steps.title: ·Adjust balance volume to new sample volume
steps.instruction: ·Adjust balance volume to new sample volume.

steps.title: ·Put 50 mL tube with homogenate...
steps.instruction: ·Put 50 mL tube with homogenate and balance in Rotor F-35-6-30.

steps.title: 2 st slow centrifugation
steps.instruction: 2 st slow centrifugation: Close rotor lid tightly, Close centrifuge. Set centrifuge: 2000 rpm, 10 min, 4 °C

steps.title: ·After centrifugation finished, take tube from...
steps.instruction: ·After centrifugation finished, take tube from centrifuge and put on ice.

steps.title: ·Transfer supernatant into fresh tube
steps.instruction: ·Transfer supernatant into fresh tube. Label tube “Supernatant 2”

steps.title: ·Discard pellet
steps.instruction: ·Discard pellet.

steps.title: ·Adjust balance volume to new sample volume
steps.instruction: ·Adjust balance volume to new sample volume.

steps.title: )" target="_blank" rel="noopener">2 )" target="_blank" rel="noopener">st...
steps.instruction: )" target="_blank" rel="noopener">2 )" target="_blank" rel="noopener">st )" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> fast centrifugation : Close rotor lid tightly, close centrifuge. Set centrifuge: 7830 rpm, 20 min, 4 °C

steps.title: ·After centrifugation finished, take tube from...
steps.instruction: ·After centrifugation finished, take tube from centrifuge and put on ice.

steps.title: ·Change rotor for Rotor FA-45-48-11 for 48 2 mL tubes
steps.instruction: ·Change rotor for Rotor FA-45-48-11 for 48 2 mL tubes.

steps.title: ·With q-tips carefully remove fat floating on top of supernatant
steps.instruction: ·With q-tips carefully remove fat floating on top of supernatant.

steps.title: ·Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: ·Discard supernatant.

steps.title: ·Resuspend pellet in 12 mL of Tissue Lysis Buffer
steps.instruction: ·Resuspend pellet in 12 mL of Tissue Lysis Buffer.

steps.title: ·Transfer for 2 mL into fresh 2 mL microcentrifuge tubes
steps.instruction: ·Transfer for 2 mL into fresh 2 mL microcentrifuge tubes.

steps.title: ·Load rotor distributing tubes equally
steps.instruction: ·Load rotor distributing tubes equally.

steps.title: Wash centrifugation
steps.instruction: Wash centrifugation: Close rotor lid tightly, close centrifuge, Set centrifugre: 12700 rpm, 20 min, 4 °C

steps.title: ·After centrifugation finished, take tube from...
steps.instruction: ·After centrifugation finished, take tube from centrifuge and put on ice.

steps.title: ·Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: ·Discard supernatant.

steps.title: ·Pellets resuspend in 5-6 mL of...
steps.instruction: ·Pellets resuspend in 5-6 mL of Tissue Lysis Buffer and transfer into 15 mL conical tube.

steps.title: ·Put back Rotor F-35-6-30 for 15 and 50 mL tubes
steps.instruction: ·Put back Rotor F-35-6-30 for 15 and 50 mL tubes.

steps.title: ·Set centrifuge
steps.instruction: ·Set centrifuge: 7830 rpm, 20 min, 4 °C

steps.title: ·After centrifugation finished, take tube from...
steps.instruction: ·After centrifugation finished, take tube from centrifuge and put on ice.

steps.title: ·Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: ·Discard supernatant.
3. Mitochondria Protein Extraction

steps.title: Prepare 10 mL of Cell Lysis...
steps.instruction: Prepare 10 mL of Cell Lysis Buffer with 1 tablet of Proteinase Inhibitor (PI) cocktail.

steps.title: ·Label tube with preparation date
steps.instruction: ·Label tube with preparation date.

steps.title: Using 5mL serological pipette add to...
steps.instruction: Using 5mL serological pipette add to mitochondria pellet up to 5 mL of Cell Lysis Buffer.

steps.title: ·Using
steps.instruction: ·Using

steps.title: Using 200 µL pipettor with 200...
steps.instruction: Using 200 µL pipettor with 200 µL pipette tip add 50 µL of Triton X-100.

steps.title: ·Pipette up and down 20 times...
steps.instruction: ·Pipette up and down 20 times to make sure all Triton X-100 was washed from the tip.

steps.title: ·Resuspend the pellet
steps.instruction: ·Resuspend the pellet.

steps.title: Incubate 15 min 4 °C (in cold room) with rotation
steps.instruction: Incubate 15 min 4 °C (in cold room) with rotation.

steps.title: ·Transfer 2 mL into fresh 2 mL microcentrifuge tubes
steps.instruction: ·Transfer 2 mL into fresh 2 mL microcentrifuge tubes.

steps.title: ·Change rotor for Rotor FA-45-48-11 for...
steps.instruction: ·Change rotor for Rotor FA-45-48-11 for 48 x 2 mL tubes.

steps.title: ·Load rotor distributing tubes equally
steps.instruction: ·Load rotor distributing tubes equally.

steps.title: ·Close rotor lid tight
steps.instruction: ·Close rotor lid tight.

steps.title: ·Close centrifuge
steps.instruction: ·Close centrifuge.

steps.title: ·Set centrifuge
steps.instruction: ·Set centrifuge: 12,700 rpm, 20 min 4 °C

steps.title: ·After centrifugation finished, take tube from...
steps.instruction: ·After centrifugation finished, take tube from centrifuge and put on ice.

steps.title: ·Transfer supernatant into 5 mL tube
steps.instruction: ·Transfer supernatant into 5 mL tube.

steps.title: Next step – protein concentration measurement
steps.instruction: Next step – protein concentration measurement. Summar Lab SOP #4 “Protein Quantification by Bradford Assay”
